summary: The diff implements the three requested requirements with good coverage. REQ-15 is largely addressed via backend changes and frontend wiring of mutations with toast notifications. REQ-16 is addressed via a new currency utility and its usage across fee-related pages. REQ-17 is addressed via role-based service menus in Navigation.tsx and individual dashboard sidebars. However, several specific gaps exist: staffServices and parentServices in Navigation.tsx are incomplete (missing several required menu items), the Student nav in Navigation.tsx is missing 'Announcements', and the admin Navigation menu is missing 'Exams & Records Portal'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Staff service menu in Navigation must include: My Profile, Assigned Courses, Enrolled Students, Announcements, Exams & Records Portal
missing_requirements.reason: In Navigation.tsx, staffServices only contains 'Dashboard' — all five required staff service links are missing from the Navigation dropdown, though StaffDashboard.tsx sidebar has them.

missing_requirements.requirement: Parent service menu in Navigation must include: Linked Student Overview, Student Results, Fee Status, Course Registrations
missing_requirements.reason: In Navigation.tsx, parentServices only contains 'Dashboard' — all four required parent service links are missing from the Navigation dropdown, though ParentDashboard.tsx sidebar has them.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin service menu in Navigation must include 'Exams & Records Portal'
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation.tsx adminServices does not include an 'Exams & Records Portal' entry, though AdminDashboard.tsx sidebar does include it.

missing_requirements.requirement: Student service menu in Navigation must include 'Announcements'
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation.tsx studentServices does not include an 'Announcements' link, though StudentDashboard.tsx sidebar includes it.

hallucinated_features.description: Student search/filter functionality added to StudentManagementPage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a search feature for the student list, but the diff adds a searchQuery state and filters students by name, ID, and email.
